title: schedonorus nitidus
intro: Schedonorus nitidus, also known as sweet grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schedonorus nitidus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Schedonorus nitidus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to calm the mind and body.
